label: 点集连网
description: 把 POI 点集在障碍约束下连成道路拓扑线网。从 POI 网格自动取最大值格作为连接点，用 Prim 最小生成树（曼哈顿权）决定连线，再对每条边用 A* 正交寻路绕开障碍，最后按 roadWidth 形态学膨胀。coverPoi=false 时输出会扣掉 POI 格点。
description-en: Connects a set of POI points into a road topology network under obstacle constraints. Extracts max-value cells from the POI grid as connection points, builds a Prim minimum spanning tree (Manhattan weight) to decide edges, routes each edge with orthogonal A* around obstacles, then dilates by roadWidth. When coverPoi is false the POI cells are removed from the output.
icon: 深色背景上几个离散圆点被横平竖直的细线连成一张网络，点之间用亮色短线段相连，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: poiGrid
inputs.label: POI 网格
inputs.description: POI 网格，自动提取值最大的格子坐标作为连接点（保留网格尺寸）。
inputs.description-en: POI grid; cells with the maximum value are extracted as connection points (grid size preserved).

inputs.name: obstacle
inputs.label: 障碍场
inputs.description: 障碍物网格，非零格不可通行。不传时按 poiGrid 尺寸建空白障碍。
inputs.description-en: Obstacle grid; non-zero cells are impassable. If omitted, an empty obstacle of poiGrid size is used.

inputs.name: roadWidth
inputs.label: 道路宽度
inputs.description: 道路宽度（格），通过膨胀实现。默认 2。
inputs.description-en: Road width in cells via dilation. Default 2.

inputs.name: roadValue
inputs.label: 道路值
inputs.description: 道路格写入的数值，默认 1。
inputs.description-en: Value written to road cells. Default 1.

inputs.name: coverPoi
inputs.label: 覆盖格点
inputs.description: 是否在输出道路中保留 POI 格点。true：道路包含 POI 格点；false：从道路中扣掉 POI 格点（POI 所在位置置 0）。默认 false。
inputs.description-en: Whether to keep POI cells in the output road. true: road includes POI cells; false: POI cells are removed from the output (set to 0). Default false.

outputs.name: topology
outputs.label: 道路拓扑
outputs.description: 道路线网 0/roadValue grid，道路格=roadValue，其余=0。
outputs.description-en: Road topology grid (0/roadValue); road cells = roadValue, others = 0.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 名称清单，格式 [{id, name, type}]，包含道路项。
outputs.description-en: Name list [{id, name, type}] with the road entry.
